MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-04-2025 IN 206, DEFENDANT SEILER LLP AND PLAINTIFF CATHERINE LAZARE'S JOINT MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DATES WAS HEARD. LAURA RYAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SEILER LLP AND SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, ERIC PANITZ, ESQ. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) AND REQUIRED COUNSEL TO PAY A $60 MOTION FILING FEE/SANCTION (IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION). $60 FEE MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 03/10/25 IS CONTINUED TO 09/08/25 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. COUNSEL TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER, APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

LAW AND MOTION, 302,DEFENDANT SEILER LLP.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION; SCHEDULED FOR FEB-06-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR, PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. (PER EMAIL 01/14/2026).
